summary: Poderosos pirómanos imperialistas ignoran las normas civilizadoras y por doquier los demás se muestran apáticos e impotentes ante los incendios. Leer

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Monday
summary: Eight injured by very strong winds in Catalonia, forest fire breaks out in Murcia, Spain to streamline euthanasia process in urgent cases and more news on Monday March 30th.
